R Notebook

library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)
data("penguins")
test_data = na.omit(penguins) %>% dplyr::rename(y = sex, x1 = flipper_len, x2 = bill_len, f1 = island)

fit = breg_laplace(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1, data = test_data, family = "bernoulli_logistic", prior_scale = 100) # large prior scale -> results should be similar to MLE
compare = glm(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1, data = prepare_data(parse_formula(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1), test_data), family = binomial())
data("penguins")
test_data = na.omit(penguins) %>% dplyr::rename(y = body_mass, x1 = flipper_len, x2 = bill_len, f1 = island, f2 = sex) |> dplyr::mutate(y = ifelse(y > 5000, 5000, y))

fit = breg_laplace(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1, 
                   data = test_data, 
                   prior_scale = 100, # large prior scale -> results should be similar to MLE
                   family = "right_censored_linear",
                   tol_obj = 1e-11,
                   )
compare = censReg::censReg(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1, right = 5000, data = prepare_data(parse_formula(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1), test_data))

fit$optim_fit$value
[1] -2035.075
plot.breg_laplace(fit, group = "f1", x = "x1")

plot.breg_laplace(fit, group = "f1")

plot.breg_laplace(fit)

plot.breg_laplace(fit, x = "x1")

data("Loblolly")
Loblolly = as.data.frame(Loblolly)
Loblolly$Seed = factor(Loblolly$Seed)
Loblolly[1:15,]
foo = parse_formula(height ~ age + (age | Seed))
foo
foo$random
bar = paste(foo$lhs, "~", paste(foo$random$Seed, collapse = " + ")) |> formula()
bar
Xg_list = list()
for(i in 1:length(levels(Loblolly$Seed))){
  Xg_list[[i]] = model.matrix(bar, data = Loblolly |> subset(Seed == levels(Loblolly$Seed)[[i]]))
}
Xg = Matrix::bdiag(Xg_list)
Xg
glmm_matrix = function(formula, data){
  formula_info = parse_formula(formula)
  gfactor = names(formula_info$random)[1]
  gef_formula = paste(foo$lhs, "~", paste(formula_info$random[[gfactor]], collapse = " + ")) |> formula()
  
  Xg_list = list()
  for(i in 1:length(levels(data[,gfactor]))){
    data_subset = data[data[,gfactor] == levels(data[,gfactor])[[i]],]
    Xg_list[[i]] = model.matrix(gef_formula, data = data_subset)
  }
  Xg = bdiag(Xg_list)
  return(Xg)
}
glmm_matrix(height ~ age + (age | Seed), data = Loblolly)
